title: Skullcandy Jib True Wireless Earbud with Microphone / 22 Hour Battery Life / Use with iPhone and Android / Best for Gym, and Gaming / Bluetooth Earbud Headphones - Black/Orange
description: Experience total freedom on a budget with Jib True. The newest true wireless earbud from Skullcandy is easy to connect and easy to enjoy. Call, track change, and volume controls are all within close reach through one main button. 22 hours of audio on a single charge means you spend less time recharging and more time enjoying your music. Jib True earbuds are adventure-ready, too. An IPX4 rating means Jib True is sweat- and dust-resistant. You don’t need to worry about damage if a little rain kicks up during your urban or outdoor adventure. Dual microphones make your calls more clear and if you feel like keeping one ear open, you can use either bud ‘solo’ without missing a beat.
features: Supreme Sound - Powered by 6mm drivers the Jib features dynamic audio with gnarly bass and a wide sound range. The earbuds also feature bluetooth 5.0 for a strong signal making sure you can listen to your music or take phone calls interruption free.

22 Hours of Play - With a 55mAh battery in the earbud and 500 mAh in the charging case you'll get a whopping 22 hours of charge total, 6 in the earbuds and 16 in the case. Use the included charging case for on the go charging as well as safe storage for your earbuds.

Dual Microphones - keeping you sounding extra clear while on calls or talking to your best friend Siri. Dual mics also means you can have 1 ear open and 1 earbud in while on calls to keep aware of your surroundings.

Small, Medium, Large Ears - Included in the Jib is 3 different eargel tips to make sure you have comfy noise isolating fit. The earbuds are super lightweight and water/dust resistant perfect for the active person!
Buy With Confidence - 1 year manufacturer's warranty included with the Jib, be sure to wear your earbuds with full confidence.

reviews.title: Tis Loud! Has great bass & long lasting battery!
reviews.text:
Alot of headphones lack good bass and sometimes cuts out, but not this set, these earbuds have great bass without over doing it.

Not a bad price to boot, and they're Skullcandy, nough said

reviews.title: Was expecting more from these
reviews.text: I love Skull Candy. But honestly I was expecting more and a better sound. They actually hurt my ears so they were a no go for me. Gave them to a niece.

reviews.title: I love Skullcandy Products!
reviews.text: Must BUY NOW!!💪👍

reviews.title: Good sound
reviews.text: They sound great. But they don't stay in the ear very well. I would buy this brand again. Maybe not this  Style

reviews.title: Amazing for the price... Great range, sound good.
reviews.text:
Battery latest me my whole work day.

Sound is good enough, bluetooth range is impressive, better then my Samsung buds.

Easy setup.

So far, very happy. Some people say I sound like im in an empy room, but some times it doesnt happen?

I dont know if its true noise canceling, but the buds are tight enough you dont get outside noise.

title: AGVEE 32Bit 384Khz USB-C to 3.5mm Headphone Adapter, Type-C Aux Jack Earbuds Splitter, USBC Audio Earphones Dongle, PD 30W Charging Converter for Samsung S21 S20, Note 20 10, Pixel 2 3 4 5, Black
description:
⭕[SUPPORT PD & QC FAST CHARGING]
This is an upgraded version that supports PD and QC charging protocols. Maximum power is 9V*2A=18W.
⭕[HIGH CONFIGURATION CHIP]
Built-in Realtek advanced digital audio processing chip, 32-bit stereo audio DAC, 384K sampling rate, active noise reduction, gives you Hi-res sound performance. Conversion distortion is less than 1%. You can use a not particularly bad earbuds for a simple comparison test.
⭕[CLEAR AUDIO MUSIC & CALLING]
High Resolution Audio by DAC is pure without any unpleasant bottom noise. With a higher dynamic range and 120dB Signal Noise Ratio, it can ensure good resolution in both low-frequency and high-frequency, and accurately reproduce all details in music. Good high frequency extension performance. The medium frequency is clean and full, with flexibility and strength, the voice is friendly and natural. The low frequency is thick and heavy, giving you a powerful pleasure.
⭕[COMPATIBLE WITH]
This 2-in-1 USB C to 3.5mm Aux Headphone Charging Adapter is specailly designed for USB-C phones without 3.5mm audio port, you can listen to music with 3.5mm earbuds and fast charging at the same time. Support remote control and low noise calls. It's a little tight for iPad Pro.
For iPad pro (2020) 11 & 12.9 -[A2232, A2230, A2229, A2228, A2069, A2068] & iPad Air 2020.
For iPad pro (2020) 11 & 12.9 -[A2232, A2230, A2229, A2228, A2069, A2068] & iPad Air 2020.
For iPad pro (2018) 11 & 12.9 -[A1980 A2013 A1934 A1979 A1876 A1895 A2014 A1983].
For iPad pro (2018) 11 & 12.9 -[A1980 A2013 A1934 A1979 A1876 A1895 A2014 A1983].
For Samsung Galaxy S21 S20(Ultra, FE 5G), Note 20 10(Ultra & Plus), Z Filp, Z Fold 2, A80, Tab S5e/S6.
For Samsung Galaxy S21 S20(Ultra, FE 5G), Note 20 10(Ultra & Plus), Z Filp, Z Fold 2, A80, Tab S5e/S6.
For Google Pixel 2, 2XL, 3, 3XL, 3A, 3A-XL, 4, 4 XL, 5, 5XL, 6, 6 Pro.
For Google Pixel 2, 2XL, 3, 3XL, 3A, 3A-XL, 4, 4 XL, 5, 5XL, 6, 6 Pro.
features: 💓[HUMANIZED UPGRADE] You can connect the phone, headphones and charge cable together in any order, You do not have to connect in order.

🚀[HIGH FIDELITY OUTPUT]High-Excursion drivers that allow for greater dynamic range, improved bass, and lower distortion. Signal Noise Ratio (SNR) 120dB. Total Harmonic Distortion (THD) 90dB. Professional class G headphone output. Active noise cancellation (ANC) feature. Support 44.1k-384k/32bit full frequency sampling. So many excellent parameters ensure an immersive & vivid gaming & music experience.

🌱[HI-RES SOUND] The Hi-Res certified DAC converter provides high-resolution audio, which can express the ultimate quality of music and the reproduction of the original sound, and get the real feeling of the original singer or performer in the live performance. Very suitable for HIFI earbuds. Because the chip is ultra-low power, compared to those with high power consumption, it can effectively extend the phone battery life without worrying about battery overload.

🚩[KEY UPDATES & FAST CHARGING] [1]-Support PD & QC Fast Charing. [2]-Seamless USB C male connector, ensure better anti-interference transmission. [3]-The Latest High Speed and High Resolution Decoding Chip. Support Maximum Power 18W(9V*2A), compatible with PD & QC charging protocol. Cannot be used for data transfer. Support remote control and low noise calls. (Volume +/- of original Apple 3.5mm earpods is not supported.)

⭕[COMPATIBLE WITH] The following device are recommended: For iPad Pro (2020, 2018) 12.9 & 11 & iPad Air 2020; For Samsung Galaxy S21 S20(Ultra, FE 5G), Note 20 10(Ultra), Z Filp, Z Fold 2, A80, Tab S5e/S6; For Google Pixel 2/2XL/3/3XL/3A/3A XL/4/4XL/5/6/6 Pro, Essential Phone. For GoPro Hero 9 8 7. Due to the inconsistency of the type-c protocol of each device brand, the unlisted device are not recommended, there may be incompatibility.

reviews.title: Wanted to love it.
reviews.text:
Like others, the top slipped off because it arrived “cracked”. I never dropped the case. I thought by snapping the pieces back together it would keep it secure, but it was only temporary. The top would constantly fall off until I looked down one day and it was gone. So unfortunately it’s not worth the price, but it looked amazing while it lasted.

I would not recommend.

reviews.title: Love.

title: SIMOLIO Wireless Headphones for TV Watching with Transmitter/Charging Dock 2 in 1, 2.4G Wireless Earbuds for TV Listening, Dialog Mode & Boosted Vol & Spare Battery for Seniors, by-Pass, 100ft Range
features: WIRELESS EARPHONES FOR TV FOR HARD OF HEARING W/ TV AUDIO LISTENING ASSISTANCE - Voice clarity and noise reduction tech reduces distracting background noises and makes you hear each word spoken on your favorite show with full intelligibility. Automatic signal control tech stabilizes sudden increases in TV volume to prevent damage to your hearing. Supports optical, RCA and 3.5 mm audio outputs on most TVs. Not recommended for pacemaker carriers.

ADVANCED 2.4GHZ AUTO FHSS TECH, NO PAIRING OR DELAY, 100FT LONG TRANSMISSION - Operating on the 2.4GHz radio frequency, this tv wireless earphone has superior sound reproduction and a powerful signal that can pass through ceilings or walls. No pairing required, no lip-sync delay, no need to be facing a certain angle or position, and no interference when someone passes by.

PROFESSIONAL WIRELESS TV HEADPHONE, CUSTOMIZE THE TV SOUND TO BEST FIT YOU - people with different sound frequency sensitivities can select TONE (treble/normal/bass) to find the best parameters and hear the target source clearly. The BALANCE control is specifically designed for people with different hearing levels in the left and right ears. You can select STEREO on the transmitter to enjoy Hi-fi music or MONO to enjoy clearer TV conversations.

UNIQUE 3 IN 1 DESIGN TV HEADPHONES FOR FULL CONVENIENCE, ERGONOMIC NECKBAND & SOFT EARBUDS & SPARE BATTERY FOR LASTING TV ENJOYMENT - Transmitter, charging base and headset stand 3-in-1 design for your full convenience. The built-in rechargeable and replaceable Li-battery supports 7 hours playtime. A spare battery is always in the base charged & ready for lasting TV enjoyment. The ergonomic neckband design and ultra-soft ear tips bring you an easy and comfortable TV viewing experience.

WIRELESS EARBUDS FOR TV WITH INNOVATIVE “BY-PASS” FEATURE SUPPORTS SIMULTANEOUS AUDIO TRANSMISSION TO WIRELESS HEADPHONE AND WIRED TV SOUBNDBAR - If you only have one TV audio output and it is currently occupied by your soundbar or AV receiver, the by-pass feature can help you, and it’s the best solution for families watching TV together.

reviews.title: Nice headphone set
reviews.text: This is an excellent headphone set. I am hard of hearing and watch tv late at night, often the volume is too high and I disturb my family’s sleep, this set solves the problem, now I can hear the tv and they get a sound night’s sleep!. The ear pieces fit comfortably and great sound quality. I like that they are wireless and comfortable to wear.

reviews.title: Sweeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeet!
reviews.text:
These headphone cables just flat out look sweeeet! I bought them for their looks alone and to be honest, they do NOT make any sonic difference in my music and they should NOT! That sort of drivel is the rote of the dreaded frAudiophile. I listen to music, not equipment. But I do look at my equipment and these cables look great!

Buy them if you want to class up your 'phones. I did!

Trust me. I know what I'm doin' when I'm reviewin'.

reviews.title: Almost perfect replacement earpad
reviews.text: I needed a set of replacement ear pads for a pair of Plantronics headsets. There were 2 pairs in the package. They work just like the OEM and feel good on the ears. Fitting them over the earpieces does take a little patience. But they do fit and will sit down into the groove. I used a credit card and ran it around the grooved area. This is a good product for the money spent.

reviews.title: Nice little bud case
reviews.text: I could imagine a few other ways to utilize this little zippered case, designed for earbuds. But, it works very well for it's intended purpose. Even for some styles that have the 'wrap around' type support, as shown in my pics. It was a little snug, but they fit. The standard buds (either wired or wireless) fit much better. The case itself is nice 'pleather', good zipper and nicely appointed swivel snap to attach it to whatever you want to hang it on. My wife chose the natural leather color to go with one particular purse. She hangs it on the outside of the purse, like a 'bling' effect. Looks great. Good purchase. Five stars.

reviews.title: Just what the doctor ordered
reviews.text: I was looking for a case that would hold my slightly over-sized earbuds without it being too large or too bulky. These fit perfectly in my briefcase and there is plenty of room for my over-sized buds. It's a really  attractive case  for the money. I'm not sure if that is real leather, but who cares as long as they protect  what's inside. The added hook comes in handy since I can attach it to a loop in my briefcase so that it doesn't sink to the bottom and I have to dig for it.

reviews.title: Well made
reviews.text: Very well made.  Anticipate it lasting a very long time.  plenty of room. Use it to hold my headset for cellphone.  Very pleased with product.

reviews.title: Perfect size
reviews.text: I got this to hold my hearing aids, and they fit perfectly with room for extra batteries.

reviews.title: Good sound and battery life, touch activated button bad
reviews.text: Overall, this is a good earbud. However, if you hold it in your hand you run the risk of your skin/touch activating the voice commands, it hears a random snippet of what you’re saying and it calls someone from your address book that kinda sorta sounds like what you had said and you have to quickly try to hang up as your phone dials someone you haven’t talked to in 5 years, you whispering “oh f*** nononono” over and over until it hangs up and you pray it didn’t actually connect on their side but it does every damn time and then you’re forced into a conversation of pleasantries. So like...yeah it works well, good range but the touch activated button was a big no from me.

reviews.title: Can wear one at a time. Lasts a long time.
reviews.text: Absolutely adore these. Not one person looked at it in my ear and I can use one at a time. Love these!

reviews.title: Very Good Portable CD Player With Plenty of Options
reviews.text:
With the onset of Pandora, satellite radio and many other such options, I found I wasn’t playing my CDs anymore. In fact, I couldn’t find my CD player! And the high-end system in my truck doesn’t even have a CD option. So when I saw this I figured I give it a try. I like that it’s portable and plays without skipping even when bumped, running with it, or the dog knocking it off of the table. It can be used with my several different sets of earphones. It also plugs into my truck stereo without a problem.

I also wanted it to play through its own speaker while in my crafts room. This is where the 5th star gets removed. When turning it up nearly all the way the speaker starts to buzz on certain notes. It isn’t loud at all on its own either so using it without auxiliary speakers is not good if more than about 8 feet from it. However, I am playing my CDs which I have not heard in years, and that makes me very happy.

reviews.title: Fun and good

Very portable, small size.
The sound is ok.
Has been using it non stop and still working good.
Would be a fun gift for someone who likes old school (on a fun way, not like a collector)
We like it.

reviews.title: Sound Profile is Very Good, ANC is Ok
reviews.text:
My experience with JVC up to this point has been with video equipment and televisions. My experiences have been positive so I hoped that this would be a good set of Active Noise Canceling (ANC) phones. I have worked with a lot of ANC phones – Bose, Sennheiser, Sony, Philips and more. Almost every set I have used has had some flaw, either in the ANC or in the sound profile. These JVC phones are interesting in that regard. The sound profile is nearly spot on, but the ANC is on the conservative side.

I’ll go over the ANC first. This is not a real competitor for the high end Sony or Bose sets and if the main thing you want from a set of ANC phones is noise elimination then these are far from the strongest or most aggressive. I have a fan that I use as the main test for ANC phones, and with the most aggressive phones the fan is almost completely wiped out. The JVC phones do cancel a good bit of noise, but it leaves a good bit of sound behind that Bose in particular eliminates. Now, that said, ANC headphones that can cancel more than these are almost universally much more expensive, often by double the price. These are what can probably be called “good enough for most”. For me, I like a more aggressive headphone, but these cancel enough ambient noise that when I am listening to music I don’t hear much else.

Many ANC phones fiddle with the sound profile to compensate for some of the lost frequency response, usually in the bass range and at the expense of the midrange. These phones are very unusual in that they don’t really seem to impact the sound profile much at all. And, the sound is very balanced. The bass is good, not overdriven (if you have ever used Dre Beats or Monster phones, you know exactly what I’m talking about). The midrange is warm and music sounds like it has the right depth as a result. The highs are clear and vocals sound very clean. The sound profile does not seem to be different between when the ANC function is on or off, though turning on the ANC does enhance the volume (which you can observe by having the headphones off when you activate the ANC in the middle of playback.

The ear cups are comfortable and I can wear these for a while before I need to take them off for comfort reasons. They don’t seem to get too warm when wearing for a while which is good. They’re not the most comfortable phones I have used, but they are better than many.

They connect via Bluetooth and I had no issues pairing and connecting them to my phone.

My favorite feature is that there is an independent volume control on the headphones themselves that does not change the volume setting on the source device. This is a feature that is a bit unusual; often, when the phones have a volume control on them it impacts the system volume when adjusted.

So, there is one thing about these phones that I think needs some improvement. Included with them is a cloth bag for protection, and that’s just not going to cut it, particularly in this price range. A bag prevents the contents from getting dirty but provides no damage protection. For the asking price (presently $149) these should have a hard case that at a minimum provides crush resistance.

I am very pleased with these headphones, more than I expected to be. They sound great, though the ANC is passable. My biggest issue isn’t with the phones themselves but with the lack of a suitable protective case. Hopefully JVC will resolve that issue in the near future. If you want a good set of ANC phones without spending north of $300, these are worth a look.

reviews.title: Comfortable, noise cancellation actually works well.
reviews.text:
I have a very good pair of Bluetooth Sony earphones with pretty good noise cancellation, but I wanted a second set that could be used with a regular 3mm plug with my phone. Traveling brings enough aggravation without worrying about battery life on one more gadget.

These are very comfortable on the ears for an hour or two while listening to an audio book and my ears don't get hot. These are light enough not to cause cauliflower ear either. I tested the noise cancellation feature both at home with the tv and in a semi truck idling. Those trucks are pretty quiet inside compared to standing next to one outside, but the noise is still there and it impedes sleep if you're not used to it. I'm pretty pleased with how well these block external noise - it's an absolute difference and a little better than my Sonys.

Music is a pleasure with these also. There are adjustments to increase bass etc if you're so inclined. My primary use though is audio books. The full production Audible Originals with a full cast and sound effects are especially nice with these headphones - you can hear the background noises and details clearly and not the dog barking next door. I find myself reaching for these almost every day lately.

reviews.title: Better than my beloved Bose QuietComfort 35 (Series I)
reviews.text:
Yes, my Bose is a a couple years old, but it cost twice as much as this JVC unit, and Bose has a nice hard shell case, but this JVC works great. It comes with a nylon mesh storage pouch with drawstring, 3.5 mm cord (great for in-seat entertainment on newer jets), and (short) charging USB cord. It arrived too late for a recent flight to LA, but sitting in the kitchen with a 20 year old refrigerator running, and a central air conditioner running that sounds similar to a 737, I put these JVC headhones on, turned on the Noise Cancelling, and ... virtual silence! Word of warning for those new to noise-cancelling headphones, they won't be miracle workers in "open office" or cubicle workplaces, but will help reduce that type of noise a bit. Huge bonus: if using just the noise cancelling (NC) features and not the music/BT feature, 35+ hour battery life is claimed. Even with NC and BT, 16 hours is claimed.

Next step: Add some music! Listened to some music and turned the NC on and off, and back, and could hardly notice ANY loss of music fidelity and tonal range. Some cheap NC headphone tend to just clip certain frequencies.

Nice and comfortable. Over the ear design is the only way to go.

Easy to pair; you can use the standard pairing, or if your phone have NFC, you can open your BT settings page, and tap your phone on the "N" NFC logo on the left earpiece, and a pop-up asks if you want to pair to the JVC. Yes, I did. No more scrolling through a long list of BT devices available (wretched Tile and air furnace filters, my Bose that shows up as a "Zebra Machine", etc.)

And yes, in BT mode, these have a microphone so you can take and make phone calls. Microphone quality is okay, not great. There are controls on the headset to increase volume, lower volume, switch to next track, previous track, accept phone calls, etc.

So if a mesh bag and so-so microphone quality are good with you, these are a great choice.

reviews.title: JVC suprised me
reviews.text:
This is my first pair of JVC, as I have been using Beats headphones for many years, and BOSE portable speakers. I have to admit that I've always passed up JVC thinking that it was my grandfather's brand and that Beats must be better because their more modern, boy was I mistaken.

If there is one thing I appreciate is really good LOUD and clear music. I want to hear the producer coughing in the background when I sit down to listen. These headphones provide me with that level of sound. What's more (and even better) is that other people can't tell how loud my phones are. With the Beats, I would sometimes get double-takes at the gym if someone can hear my music. Not because of the genre but because of how loud they are. With these, no one can hear my music. Mine all mine, and I'm not forced to share my playlist with the guy on the decline bench next to me.

The noise cancellation is better than Beats. If someone is next to me and talking directly to me, then I can hear muffled sounds but not actual syllables and words. But far away noises are just actions in silence, gosh that's perfection.

I have those miniature cloth shower-cap thingies to put on the phones to keep them from getting icky but I don't think these will be for the gym. I think these will be after-work, cognac and cigar phones to listen to the classics. Nice.

title: iFrogz Animatones Volume Limiting Headphones for Kids - Green
description: The Animatones headphones feature playful child friendly styling and volume limiting speakers. Kids will love the fun look, sturdy, and lightweight construction. Parents can feel safe knowing the built-in volume governor will not play media over 85 decibels. Connects with a 3.5mm jack.
features: Lightweight and comfortable
Volume limiter to protect young ears
Driver Unit: 30 mm neodymium / Impedance: 16 ohms
Sensitivity: 85 dB +/- 3 dB at 1 kHz / Frequency Response: 20 Hz to 20 kHz
Cord Length: 1.2 m

reviews.title: cute but not functional for small ears
reviews.text: Really cute but still too big for my 6 year old son :(

reviews.title: I originally bought these for my son but I love them myself
reviews.text: I originally bought these for my son but I love them myself. I may get another pair for me. I've always had trouble with earbuds and now I know it was because they were too big for me ears. These fit comfortably. They also fit my son. So great for that too.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Perfect size for my 4 year old

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Kid sound monitoring safety headphones love them

reviews.title: Great for those headphones that are on the school supply list!
reviews.text: The only complaints we have with these are that the headband feels kind of flimsy and doesn't seem to adjust and also the ear foam finds its way off after awhile. However, with that being said, I would also like to note that the size is perfect (for my 5 year old daughter), the sound is pretty dang good for kids headphones and the design is cute.
